title: bursa robusta
intro: Bursa robusta, also known as the woolly bursage or bur sage, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Bursa robusta include its use in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Bursa robusta can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine and homeopathic remedies.
